dashboard_line: Fixed implementation_spec.py: wired 7 missing manifest fields, phase gates
notes: CRITICAL FIX: 7 missing fields now wired into every manifest
Fields added: discovered_work, honey_version_used, honey_rendering_context, honey_render_fidelity
Phase gate logic implemented in ManifestWriter._compute_compass_edge()
Compass edges (N/S/E/W) now computed from quality_score + belief_index + phase
BundleComposer tracks HONEY metadata: hash, presence flags, fidelity score
Backward compatible: old manifests still parseable; new manifests have extended schema
All 11 required fields present per compass schema documentation
